content:
Some teams that you can make are:
naut - caecus - ogier - tulu 
tulu - goliath - ramona - ogier
agrippa - aigis - naut - ogier
caecus - tulu - goliath - winkle
you can do a cope uvhash team if you want:
leigh - uvhash - ogier - naut for survivability
or like 
leigh - uvhash - agrippa then oger/naut as the final spot
u could also do a cope salv team:
salv - agrippa - naut - ogier
If you really wants you can play daff hypercarry but it'll be scuffed
daff - cassiah -  winkle - then any of ogier/ramona/naut

At least this is what they say in the fanserver in English, if you want more guidance and useful guides you can ask there, the link is in my bio, or i can send it.

In general the aqueor teams are the easiest to build and use at the start, and theirs standard banner is the one whit the better characters in general.
In the fan server or here is a guide for some useful gameplay mechanics to know, like the possibility to change the tentacle stance by clicking on them that a lot don't know at the start: https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1305204021425995816

It's part of a big Beginner guide project, I'm still working on the awakers and comp portion

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1DxWAqrCvAi8V1idQzltccMZPwD3LlosK7TG8jYRUajE/edit?gid=1771950944#gid=1771950944
